<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>404 — NOT FOUND</title>
  <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Share+Tech+Mono&family=VT323&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />
  <style>
    @keyframes floatLeft {
      0%   { transform: translateY(0px)   rotate(0deg); }
      20%  { transform: translateY(-14px) rotate(-0.8deg); }
      45%  { transform: translateY(-22px) rotate(-1.5deg); }
      65%  { transform: translateY(-10px) rotate(-0.4deg); }
      85%  { transform: translateY(-18px) rotate(-1deg); }
      100% { transform: translateY(0px)   rotate(0deg); }
    }
    @keyframes floatRight {
      0%   { transform: translateY(-8px)  rotate(0.5deg); }
      25%  { transform: translateY(-22px) rotate(1.2deg); }
      50%  { transform: translateY(-5px)  rotate(0.2deg); }
      70%  { transform: translateY(-24px) rotate(1.5deg); }
      90%  { transform: translateY(-12px) rotate(0.7deg); }
      100% { transform: translateY(-8px)  rotate(0.5deg); }
    }
    @keyframes glitchRed {
      0%,100%{ clip-path:inset(0 0 98% 0);  transform:translateX(0); }
      5%     { clip-path:inset(25% 0 65% 0); transform:translateX(-6px); }
      10%    { clip-path:inset(55% 0 30% 0); transform:translateX(5px); }
      15%    { clip-path:inset(10% 0 78% 0); transform:translateX(-4px); }
      20%    { clip-path:inset(70% 0 10% 0); transform:translateX(6px); }
      25%    { clip-path:inset(40% 0 45% 0); transform:translateX(-3px); }
      30%    { clip-path:inset(0 0 95% 0);   transform:translateX(0); }
      60%    { clip-path:inset(80% 0 5% 0);  transform:translateX(4px); }
      65%    { clip-path:inset(15% 0 72% 0); transform:translateX(-5px); }
      70%    { clip-path:inset(0 0 98% 0);   transform:translateX(0); }
    }
    @keyframes glitchBlue {
      0%,100%{ clip-path:inset(0 0 98% 0);  transform:translateX(0); }
      8%     { clip-path:inset(45% 0 42% 0); transform:translateX(5px); }
      13%    { clip-path:inset(20% 0 68% 0); transform:translateX(-5px); }
      18%    { clip-path:inset(65% 0 18% 0); transform:translateX(4px); }
      23%    { clip-path:inset(5% 0 82% 0);  transform:translateX(-3px); }
      28%    { clip-path:inset(0 0 97% 0);   transform:translateX(0); }
      55%    { clip-path:inset(72% 0 12% 0); transform:translateX(-4px); }
      62%    { clip-path:inset(30% 0 55% 0); transform:translateX(5px); }
      68%    { clip-path:inset(0 0 98% 0);   transform:translateX(0); }
    }
    @keyframes textJitter {
      0%,89%,100%{ transform:skewX(0deg)   translateX(0); }
      90%         { transform:skewX(-2deg)  translateX(-3px); }
      92%         { transform:skewX(1.5deg) translateX(4px); }
      94%         { transform:skewX(-1deg)  translateX(-2px); }
      96%         { transform:skewX(.5deg)  translateX(1px); }
    }
    @keyframes scanline {
      0%  { top:-4px; }
      100%{ top:100%; }
    }
    @keyframes flicker {
      0%,96%,100%{ opacity:1; }
      97%{ opacity:.4; } 98%{ opacity:.9; } 99%{ opacity:.2; }
    }
    @keyframes blink { 0%,49%{ opacity:1; } 50%,100%{ opacity:0; } }
    @keyframes vignPulse { 0%,100%{ opacity:.7; } 50%{ opacity:.45; } }
    @keyframes termReveal {
      from{ opacity:0; max-width:0; }
      to  { opacity:.8; max-width:100%; }
    }

    body{ background:#000; overflow:hidden; }

    .hand-left  { animation: floatLeft  4.6s cubic-bezier(.45,.05,.55,.95) infinite; }
    .hand-right { animation: floatRight 4.0s cubic-bezier(.45,.05,.55,.95) infinite .8s; }

    .glitch{ position:relative; animation: textJitter 5s infinite, flicker 8s infinite 2s; }
    .glitch::before,.glitch::after{
      content:attr(data-text);
      position:absolute; inset:0; width:100%;
      font-family:inherit; font-size:inherit; font-weight:inherit;
      letter-spacing:inherit; text-align:inherit;
    }
    .glitch::before{ color:#ff003c; animation:glitchRed  3.5s infinite; }
    .glitch::after { color:#00f5ff; animation:glitchBlue 3.5s infinite .15s; }

    .scanline{
      position:fixed; left:0; right:0; height:3px;
      background:linear-gradient(transparent,rgba(0,255,65,.08),transparent);
      animation:scanline 5s linear infinite;
      pointer-events:none; z-index:100;
    }
    .vignette{
      position:fixed; inset:0;
      background:radial-gradient(ellipse at center, transparent 50%, rgba(0,0,0,.75) 100%);
      animation:vignPulse 4s ease-in-out infinite;
      pointer-events:none; z-index:90;
    }
    .glow-red  { text-shadow:0 0 8px #ff003c, 0 0 20px #ff003c, 0 0 40px #cc0022; }
    .glow-green{ text-shadow:0 0 6px #00ff41, 0 0 15px #00ff41, 0 0 30px #00cc33; }
    .glow-dim  { text-shadow:0 0 4px #009922, 0 0 8px #009922; }

    .term-line{ overflow:hidden; white-space:nowrap; opacity:0; }
    .term-line:nth-child(1){ animation:termReveal .6s 1.0s forwards; }
    .term-line:nth-child(2){ animation:termReveal .6s 1.9s forwards; }
    .term-line:nth-child(3){ animation:termReveal .6s 2.8s forwards; }
    .term-line:nth-child(4){ animation:termReveal .6s 3.7s forwards; }

    .cursor::after{ content:'█'; animation:blink 1s step-end infinite; }
  </style>
</head>
<body class="relative min-h-screen flex flex-col items-center justify-center">

  <div class="scanline"></div>
  <div class="vignette"></div>

  <!-- HANDS -->
  <div class="fixed inset-0 flex items-center justify-between pointer-events-none" style="z-index:1; padding:0;">

    <!-- Left hand: show only left 50% of image -->
    <div class="hand-left" style="width:52%; overflow:hidden; display:flex; align-items:center;">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt=""
        style="width:200%; max-width:none; display:block;
               object-fit:cover; object-position:left center;
               filter:brightness(.92) contrast(1.15) grayscale(0.05);" />
    </div>

    <!-- Right hand: show only right 50% of image -->
    <div class="hand-right" style="width:52%; overflow:hidden; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:flex-end;">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt=""
        style="width:200%; max-width:none; display:block;
               margin-left:-100%;
               object-fit:cover; object-position:right center;
               filter:brightness(.92) contrast(1.15) grayscale(0.05);" />
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- 404 TEXT -->
  <div class="relative flex flex-col items-center gap-1 text-center" style="z-index:10;">

    <h1 class="glitch glow-red" data-text="404"
      style="font-family:'VT323',monospace;
             font-size:clamp(7rem,22vw,15rem);
             color:#f0f0f0; line-height:.9; letter-spacing:.08em;">
      404
    </h1>

    <p class="glitch glow-green" data-text="NOT FOUND"
      style="font-family:'Share Tech Mono',monospace;
             font-size:clamp(1rem,3.5vw,2.2rem);
             color:#00ff41; letter-spacing:.4em; margin-top:-.3em;">
      NOT FOUND
    </p>

    <div style="width:280px;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#00ff4166,transparent);margin:1rem auto;"></div>

    <div style="font-family:'Share Tech Mono',monospace;font-size:.7rem;text-align:left;max-width:440px;width:100%;padding:0 1rem;">
      <p class="term-line glow-dim" style="color:#00cc33;"><span style="color:#00ff41;">$</span> kernel: page_fault at addr 0x00000000 — SIGSEGV</p>
      <p class="term-line glow-dim" style="color:#00cc33;"><span style="color:#00ff41;">$</span> http_daemon: 404 — resource not found in FS</p>
      <p class="term-line"          style="color:#ff5555;"><span style="color:#ff003c;">!</span> recovery attempt... <strong>FAILED</strong> [code: E_NULL_VOID]</p>
      <p class="term-line cursor glow-dim" style="color:#00cc33;"><span style="color:#00ff41;">$</span> awaiting operator input</p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <script>
    const pool = ['4','0','#','@','!','%','█','▓','▒','░','Ø','Ψ','Ξ','4','0'];
    const rnd  = () => pool[Math.floor(Math.random()*pool.length)];

    const h404 = document.querySelector('h1.glitch'), orig404 = '404';
    setInterval(()=>{
      if(Math.random()>.55){
        let s=''; for(let i=0;i<3;i++) s += Math.random()<.4 ? rnd() : orig404[i];
        h404.textContent=h404.dataset.text=s;
        setTimeout(()=>{ h404.textContent=h404.dataset.text=orig404; }, 60+Math.random()*100);
      }
    }, 900);

    const hNF=document.querySelector('p.glitch'), origNF='NOT FOUND';
    setInterval(()=>{
      if(Math.random()>.72){
        const a=origNF.split(''), i=Math.floor(Math.random()*a.length);
        if(a[i]!==' ') a[i]=rnd();
        const s=a.join('');
        hNF.textContent=hNF.dataset.text=s;
        setTimeout(()=>{ hNF.textContent=hNF.dataset.text=origNF; }, 50+Math.random()*80);
      }
    }, 1400);

    // Screen tear
    const tear=document.createElement('div');
    tear.style.cssText='position:fixed;left:0;right:0;height:2px;background:rgba(0,255,65,.2);z-index:200;pointer-events:none;display:none;';
    document.body.appendChild(tear);
    setInterval(()=>{
      if(Math.random()>.6){
        tear.style.top=Math.random()*100+'vh';
        tear.style.display='block';
        setTimeout(()=>{ tear.style.display='none'; }, 40+Math.random()*80);
      }
    }, 1800);
  </script>
</body>
</html>
